html:
Exclusive to:

The Coral Nubbin is a craftable Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Refine Tab, requires a Science Machine to prototype, and 3 Limestones and a Coral Larva to craft. The Coral Nubbin will spoil after 20 days once crafted, but can be placed in an Ice Box to slow spoilage. It allows the player to plant a new Coral Reef at a chosen location in Shallow Ocean. Once planted, the Reef will first be in an empty state, but will slowly grow Corals over time. After 12 Days, a Coral Reef is fully regrown.

Tips

  • As the Coral Nubbin spoils, but the Coral Larva does not, it may be better to refrain from crafting the Coral Nubbin until the player is ready to place it.

Trivia

  • Coral Nubbins were added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

–Wilba
“Cute baby Wet Rock”
–Wormwood
“Look small enough to fire out a Pew-matic.”
–Wheeler
The Coral Nubbin is a craftable Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Refine Tab, requires a Science Machine to prototype, and 3 Limestones and a Coral Larva to craft. The Coral Nubbin will spoil after 20 days once crafted, but can be placed in an Ice Box to slow spoilage. It allows the player to plant a new Coral Reef at a chosen location in Shallow Ocean. Once planted, the Reef will first be in an empty state, but will slowly grow Corals over time. After 12 Days, a Coral Reef is fully regrown.
Tips[edit | edit source]
As the Coral Nubbin spoils, but the Coral Larva does not, it may be better to refrain from crafting the Coral Nubbin until the player is ready to place it.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Coral Nubbins were added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

San Hô Nubbin là một Vật Phẩm chế tạo được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Tinh chỉnh, yêu cầu Máy Khoa học để tạo nguyên mẫu và 3 Đá vôi và Ấu trùng San hô để chế tạo. Coral Nubbin sẽ hư hỏng sau 20 ngày kể từ khi được chế tạo, nhưng có thể được đặt trong Hộp Đá để làm chậm quá trình hư hỏng. Nó cho phép người chơi trồng một Rạn san hô mới tại một địa điểm đã chọn ở Shallow Ocean. Sau khi được trồng, Rạn san hô đầu tiên sẽ ở trạng thái trống, nhưng sẽ dần dần phát triển San hô theo thời gian. Sau 12 ngày, Rạn san hô sẽ mọc lại hoàn toàn.

The '''Coral Nubbin''' is a craftable [[Item]] introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Refine Tab]], requires a [[Science Machine]] to prototype, and 3 [[Limestone]]s and a [[Coral Larva]] to craft. The Coral Nubbin will spoil after 20 days once crafted, but can be placed in an [[Ice Box]] to slow spoilage. It allows the player to plant a new [[Coral Reef]] at a chosen location in [[Ocean#Shallow Ocean|Shallow Ocean]]. Once planted, the Reef will first be in an empty state, but will slowly grow [[Coral]]s over time. After 12 [[Day]]s, a Coral Reef is fully regrown.

=={{pic|32|Prototype}} Tips==
* As the Coral Nubbin spoils, but the Coral Larva does not, it may be better to refrain from crafting the Coral Nubbin until the player is ready to place it.

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Coral Nubbins were added to the ''Shipwrecked'' DLC more than a year after its official completion in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#November 21, 2017 - Home Sea Home Update|Home Sea Home]]'' update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
